sections.title: Dialogue before starting Tree Gnome Village

lines.speaker: Tracker gnome 2
lines.text: I can't talk now. If the guards catch me I'll be dead gnome meat.

sections.title: After returning the orb of protection to King Bolren

lines.speaker: Tracker gnome 2
lines.text: When will this battle end? I feel like I've been locked up my whole life.
